channel.title: yubikey on IT notes
channel.description: Recent content in yubikey on IT notes

item.title: gpg: selecting card failed: Operation not supported by device
item.description: If using a yubikey and getting this: gpg: selecting card failed: Operation not supported by device gpg: OpenPGP card not available: Operation not supported by device Add to ~/.gnupg/scdaemon.conf disable-ccid To debug you could use: reader-port Yubico Yubi debug-all debug-level guru disable-ccid log-file /tmp/scd.log
